name: news-digest
description: Multi-source AI news digest for Claude Code — fetches HN, arXiv, GitHub Trending, Anthropic, OpenAI, HuggingFace, Reddit, LangChain, OpenClaw, ClawHub with intelligent learning layer

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  news-digest installed!
  Run: npx news-digest
  Or copy manually:
    cp commands/news-digest.md ~/.claude/commands/
    cp agents/news-learner.md  ~/.claude/agents/
'
